title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Snapshot
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM visual scan burden by adding a browser-local derived PM intake snapshot and Markdown export to the Project Miner intake workbench, while preserving that it is review synthesis only and not an approval, persistence, import, issue, task, work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking write, hosted parity proof, or production mutation.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Visual-Scan Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a derived Local PM Intake Snapshot near the top of /pm-review/import-intake.

Derive covered, open, and blocked snapshot items from the local PM operating queue, import exception register, approval-persistence readiness gates, field-prep coverage snapshot, field-prep conversation agenda, local decision draft, executor closeout intake, field readiness checklist, field questions draft, and field observation scratchpad.
Add Export PM Intake Snapshot as a browser-local Markdown download.
Include the snapshot in the browser-local PM brief.
Include the snapshot in the browser-local executor handoff.
Avoid adding the snapshot to Approval Preview JSON or field-prep exports because those contracts are not widened by this packet.

Extend the focused import-intake smoke to prove snapshot rendering, default and updated snapshot states, no new localStorage key, standalone export content, PM brief content, executor handoff content, exact four read seams, zero mutation calls, reset behavior, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for snapshot scope review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "ready for field|ready for execution|field ready|field log of record|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|assigned|scheduled|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
PM intake snapshot wording scan passed with no matches.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after narrowing duplicate snapshot-count assertions to exact text.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
